topic.what: Machine-checked universal proofs in Lean 4/Mathlib that value-independence implies constant marginal distributions for arithmetic masking over all moduli q>0, closing the finite-domain gap in QANARY's soundness theorem
topic.how: Ring-theoretic formalization using CommRing axioms of Z/qZ; five-line tactic script proof vs 225 finite evaluations; sorry-free proof suite of nine theorems
topic.why_matters: Enables universal soundness guarantees for QANARY's structural dependency analysis covering ML-KEM (q=3329) and ML-DSA (q=8380417) without re-verification, supporting FIPS 140-3 certification

characteristics.what_it_measures: Number of tactic script lines for main theorem
characteristics.evidence: Section 4.1: complete Lean 4 proof reproduced verbatim
characteristics.context: Main theorem T1 proof in artifact QanaryUniversal/ValueIndependence.lean

characteristics.what_itasures: Range of moduli for which soundness theorem is verified
characteristics.evidence: Theorem 4.1: forall q>0, forall wire functions, forall secrets
characteristics.context: Universal quantification over q enables portability to all PQC parameter sets

characteristics.what_it_measures: Components required to trust the proof
characteristics.evidence: Section 6.3: Lean kernel is small formally-specified C++ core vs hundreds of thousands of lines in Z3/CVC5
characteristics.context: Z3 and CVC5 are complex unverified systems

characteristics.what_it_measures: Number of build tasks in proof suite
characteristics.evidence: Section 5: lake build reported 1739 tasks completed, 0 errors, 0 sorry
characteristics.context: All nine theorems (T1-T6, T1', T3') are sorry-free

characteristics.what_it_measures: Number of unverified proof stubs in artifact
characteristics.evidence: Section 5: zero sorry declarations across entire proof suite

characteristics.what_it_measures: Mutual information between secret and wire under value-independence
characteristics.evidence: Theorem 4.1 + Observation 4.2: constant histogram implies constant conditional distribution
characteristics.context: Formalized at histogram level; full mutual information formalization deferred to Paper 4

characteristics.vs_baseline: Exhaustive enumeration infeasible at q=3329 (211M wire functions)
characteristics.evidence: SMT enumeration infeasible at production moduli; Lean 4 handles universal quantification natively
characteristics.context: Structural induction vs enumeration is the core advancement

characteristics.what_it_measures: Maximum bias in uniform distribution modulo q
characteristics.evidence: Theorem T5 (ML-KEM instance): residue 0 has count 2, residue 767 has count 1
characteristics.context: Verified by native_decide; universal bounds floor(N/q) <= count(r) <= ceil(N/q) proven kernel-verified

good_for: First-order arithmetic masking verification in NTT hardware
FIPS 140-3 certification evidence for PQC accelerators
Cross-standard portability (ML-KEM, ML-DSA, future NIST PQC)
High-assurance security analysis requiring minimal trusted base
requires: Probabilistic bridge formalization (Paper 4) for complete security guarantee
